security.createUserTable: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (user_id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, user_na VARCHAR(50) UNIQUE NOT NULL, user_pw VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, profile_id INT DEFAULT 1, status_id INT DEFAULT 1, person_id INT)
security.getUser: SELECT user_id, user_na, user_pw, profile_id, status_id, person_id FROM users WHERE user_na = $1 AND user_pw = $2
security.getDataSession: SELECT user_id, user_na, profile_id, status_id, person_id FROM users WHERE user_na = $1
security.insertUser: INSERT INTO users (user_na, user_pw, profile_id, status_id) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4) RETURNING user_id
security.listUsers: SELECT user_id, user_na, profile_id, status_id FROM users ORDER BY user_id ASC

model.createProfile: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS profile (profile_id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, profile_na VARCHAR(50) UNIQUE NOT NULL)
model.createSubsystem: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS subsystem (subsystem_id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, subsystem_na VARCHAR(50) UNIQUE NOT NULL)
model.createObject: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS object (object_id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, object_na VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, subsystem_id INT NOT NULL REFERENCES subsystem(subsystem_id))
model.createMethod: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS method (method_id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, method_na VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, object_id INT NOT NULL REFERENCES object(object_id))
model.createOption: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS option (option_id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, option_na VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, object_id INT NOT NULL REFERENCES object(object_id))
model.createPermissionMethod: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS permission_method (profile_id INT NOT NULL REFERENCES profile(profile_id), method_id INT NOT NULL REFERENCES method(method_id), PRIMARY KEY (profile_id, method_id))
model.createPermissionOption: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS permission_option (profile_id INT NOT NULL REFERENCES profile(profile_id), option_id INT NOT NULL REFERENCES option(option_id), PRIMARY KEY (profile_id, option_id))
model.createUserProfile: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS user_profile (user_id INT NOT NULL REFERENCES users(user_id), profile_id INT NOT NULL REFERENCES profile(profile_id), PRIMARY KEY (user_id, profile_id))
model.loadPermissionMethod: SELECT pm.profile_id, m.method_na, o.object_na, s.subsystem_na FROM permission_method pm INNER JOIN method m ON m.method_id = pm.method_id INNER JOIN object o ON o.object_id = m.object_id INNER JOIN subsystem s ON s.subsystem_id = o.subsystem_id
model.loadPermissionOption: SELECT po.profile_id, op.option_na, s.subsystem_na FROM permission_option po INNER JOIN option op ON op.option_id = po.option_id INNER JOIN object o ON o.object_id = op.object_id INNER JOIN subsystem s ON s.subsystem_id = o.subsystem_id
model.insertPermissionMethod: INSERT INTO permission_method (profile_id, method_id) VALUES ($1, $2) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
model.insertPermissionOption: INSERT INTO permission_option (profile_id, option_id) VALUES ($1, $2) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
model.getUserProfiles: SELECT profile_id FROM user_profile WHERE user_id = $1
model.insertUserProfile: INSERT INTO user_profile (user_id, profile_id) VALUES ($1, $2) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
model.listProfiles: SELECT profile_id, profile_na FROM profile ORDER BY profile_id ASC
model.listMethods: SELECT m.method_id, m.method_na, o.object_na, s.subsystem_na FROM method m INNER JOIN object o ON o.object_id = m.object_id INNER JOIN subsystem s ON s.subsystem_id = o.subsystem_id ORDER BY m.method_id ASC
model.listOptions: SELECT op.option_id, op.option_na, o.object_na, s.subsystem_na FROM option op INNER JOIN object o ON o.object_id = op.object_id INNER JOIN subsystem s ON s.subsystem_id = o.subsystem_id ORDER BY op.option_id ASC
model.seedProfile: INSERT INTO profile (profile_id, profile_na) VALUES (1, 'Administrador') ON CONFLICT (profile_id) DO NOTHING
model.seedSubsystem: INSERT INTO subsystem (subsystem_id, subsystem_na) VALUES (1, 'security') ON CONFLICT (subsystem_id) DO NOTHING
model.seedObject: INSERT INTO object (object_id, object_na, subsystem_id) VALUES (1, 'User', 1) ON CONFLICT (object_id) DO NOTHING
model.seedOptionExport: INSERT INTO option (option_id, option_na, object_id) VALUES (1, 'exportUsers', 1) ON CONFLICT (option_id) DO NOTHING
model.seedOptionManage: INSERT INTO option (option_id, option_na, object_id) VALUES (2, 'managePermissions', 1) ON CONFLICT (option_id) DO NOTHING
model.seedPermAdminManage: INSERT INTO permission_option (profile_id, option_id) VALUES (1, 2) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
model.seedMethodListUsers: INSERT INTO method (method_id, method_na, object_id) VALUES (1, 'listUsers', 1) ON CONFLICT (method_id) DO NOTHING
model.seedMethodInsertUser: INSERT INTO method (method_id, method_na, object_id) VALUES (2, 'insertUser', 1) ON CONFLICT (method_id) DO NOTHING
model.seedPermAdminListUsers: INSERT INTO permission_method (profile_id, method_id) VALUES (1, 1) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
model.seedProfileCliente: INSERT INTO profile (profile_id, profile_na) VALUES (2, 'Cliente') ON CONFLICT (profile_id) DO NOTHING
model.seedSubsystemProducts: INSERT INTO subsystem (subsystem_id, subsystem_na) VALUES (2, 'products') ON CONFLICT (subsystem_id) DO NOTHING
model.seedObjectProduct: INSERT INTO object (object_id, object_na, subsystem_id) VALUES (2, 'Product', 2) ON CONFLICT (object_id) DO NOTHING
model.seedMethodListProducts: INSERT INTO method (method_id, method_na, object_id) VALUES (3, 'listProducts', 2) ON CONFLICT (method_id) DO NOTHING
model.seedMethodInsertProduct: INSERT INTO method (method_id, method_na, object_id) VALUES (4, 'insertProduct', 2) ON CONFLICT (method_id) DO NOTHING
model.seedPermAdminListProducts: INSERT INTO permission_method (profile_id, method_id) VALUES (1, 3) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
model.seedPermAdminInsertProduct: INSERT INTO permission_method (profile_id, method_id) VALUES (1, 4) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
model.seedPermClienteListProducts: INSERT INTO permission_method (profile_id, method_id) VALUES (2, 3) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
model.seedUserCliente: INSERT INTO users (user_na, user_pw, profile_id, status_id) VALUES ('cliente1', 'Cliente123', 2, 1) ON CONFLICT (user_na) DO NOTHING
model.seedProfileVendedor: INSERT INTO profile (profile_id, profile_na) VALUES (3, 'Vendedor') ON CONFLICT (profile_id) DO NOTHING
model.seedPermVendedorInsertProduct: INSERT INTO permission_method (profile_id, method_id) VALUES (3, 4) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
model.seedUserVendedor: INSERT INTO users (user_na, user_pw, profile_id, status_id) VALUES ('vendedor1', 'Vendedor123', 3, 1) ON CONFLICT (user_na) DO NOTHING
model.seedUserMixto: INSERT INTO users (user_na, user_pw, profile_id, status_id) VALUES ('mixto1', 'Mixto123', 2, 1) ON CONFLICT (user_na) DO NOTHING
model.seedUserProfileMixto: INSERT INTO user_profile (user_id, profile_id) SELECT user_id, 3 FROM users WHERE user_na = 'mixto1' ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
model.backfillUserProfile: INSERT INTO user_profile (user_id, profile_id) SELECT u.user_id, u.profile_id FROM users u WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM profile p WHERE p.profile_id = u.profile_id) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING

products.createProductTable: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS products (product_id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, product_na VARCHAR(100) UNIQUE NOT NULL, price NUMERIC(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0)
products.listProducts: SELECT product_id, product_na, price FROM products ORDER BY product_id ASC
products.insertProduct: INSERT INTO products (product_na, price) VALUES ($1, $2) RETURNING product_id, product_na, price
products.seedProduct1: INSERT INTO products (product_na, price) VALUES ('Teclado', 25.00) ON CONFLICT (product_na) DO NOTHING
products.seedProduct2: INSERT INTO products (product_na, price) VALUES ('Mouse', 15.50) ON CONFLICT (product_na) DO NOTHING
